data.title: Colgate-Palmolive Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE: CL) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on May 1. Analysts predict earnings of 94 cents per share, showing an increase from 91 cents in the same period last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $5.22 billion, up from $4.91 billion last year. On March 12, Colgate-Palmolive raised its quarterly cash dividend to 53 cents per share from 52 cents. The company's stock price rose by 1% to close at $85.36 on Thursday. For more detailed analyst ratings and information, visit Benzinga's website.

data.title: BayFirst Financial Stock Drops Over 37% After Hours Following Capital Raise, Q1 Loss
data.description: BayFirst Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: BAFN) experienced a significant 37% drop in after-hours trading following the announcement of Q1 2026 financial results. The company reported a net loss of $5.7 million for the quarter, a notable increase from the $2.5 million loss in the previous quarter. Additionally, the company unveiled an $80 million capital raise through a private investment in public equity (PIPE), involving the issuance of convertible preferred stock that will convert into approximately 22.9 million common shares at $3.50 per share pending approvals.Moreover, BayFirst Financial Corp. appointed Alfred Rogers as the new CEO and President of BayFirst National Bank, succeeding the retiring CEO Tom Zernick. The transition in leadership comes amidst a challenging financial landscape for the company, with a decline in net interest income to $9.4 million from $11.2 million in the previous quarter. The net interest margin was reported at 3.42%, reflecting the turbulent market conditions impacting the company's performance.

data.title: Chevron Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Before the opening bell on Friday, May 1, Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) is set to reveal its first-quarter earnings. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 97 cents per share, expected to be lower than the $2.18 per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus among analysts suggests Chevron's quarterly revenue will reach around $52.7 billion, up from $47.61 billion in the previous year. Recently, Chevron announced a successful oil discovery at the Bandit prospect in the Gulf of America. Closing at $193.31 on Thursday, Chevron's shares experienced a 0.6% increase. For more information and analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Schouw & Co. announces intention to pursue an Initial Public Offering of its portfolio business BioMar on Nasdaq Copenhagen
data.description: The Board of Directors of Schouw & Co. revealed on 12 November 2024 that they are conducting an evaluation on potentially separately listing BioMar. The aim is to assess if this move would benefit Schouw & Co. and its shareholders, while also enabling BioMar to effectively pursue growth opportunities. Following the assessment, the Board has now declared their plan to proceed with an Initial Public Offering of BioMar Group A/S on Nasdaq Copenhagen.
April saw significant transactions in a share buy-back programme, with a high volume of shares repurchased.

data.title: Interim report – first quarter of 2026
data.description: Schouw & Co. recently published their first-quarter interim report for 2026, showing a strong performance despite the challenging environment characterized by ongoing volatility, geopolitical tensions, and trade uncertainties. The company experienced extended planning cycles and cautious customer behavior in various industries due to the prevailing uncertainty. However, Schouw & Co.'s diversified portfolio met expectations during this period.
ABN AMRO purchased shares worth $50 million from 24-30 April 2026 for its buyback programme.

data.title: Loyyal Launches OfferPoint: A Merchant-Funded Offer Marketplace Driving Card Spend and Customer Engagement
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on May 1, 2026, Loyyal, a loyalty and payments ecosystem utilizing AI and blockchain technology, unveiled OfferPoint. This new merchant-funded offer marketplace aims to assist banks, digital wallets, and financial institutions in boosting card expenditures.

data.title: Best AI-SEO Marketing Agency (May 2026): Everso Media Recognized for Impactful GEO Campaigns by Better Business Advice
data.description: In New York on May 1, 2026, following a thorough review of agencies leading in AI-SEO and Generative Engine Optimization standards this year, Better Business Advice announced Everso Media as the top AI-SEO Marketing Agency for May 2026. Everso Media was acknowledged for its excellence in this field, standing out among competitors.

data.title: Barbie To Be Celebrated With New Stamps
data.description: A new stamp set is set to debut at a collectors convention in Washington this summer. Scheduled for release by the U.S. Postal Service, the set will showcase Barbie dolls representing 10 iconic careers. These stamps will feature various career-themed outfits worn by Barbie over the years. The release is highly anticipated, marking a unique collection for collectors and fans of Barbie dolls.
